661 GG0170D3_STTG_STNDG_END_CD GG0170D3_STTG_STNDG_END_CD GG0170D3 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to move to a standing position from a sitting position in a chair or on the side of
